info.title: Space-Track API
info.description: US military space surveillance REST API operated by the 18th Space Control Squadron. Provides Two-Line Element (TLE) sets, conjunction data messages, orbital element sets, satellite catalog data, and decay predictions for all tracked Earth-orbiting objects and debris.

tags.name: General Perturbations
tags.description: Current and historical SGP4 keplerian element sets (TLE/OMM)

tags.name: Satellite Catalog
tags.description: Catalog metadata for all tracked Earth-orbiting objects

tags.name: Tracking and Impact Prediction
tags.description: Reentry tracking and impact prediction messages (TIP)

tags.name: Ancillary
tags.description: Launch sites, boxscore, announcements, and other reference data

post.description: Authenticates the user and sets a session cookie required for all subsequent API requests. Credentials must not be shared between users.

200.description: Login successful. Session cookie is set.

get.description: Returns the newest SGP4 keplerian element sets for tracked objects. Supports TLE, 3LE, OMM XML, OMM KVN, JSON, CSV, and HTML output formats. Rate limit: 1 query per hour for TLEs.

200.description: Successful response with GP element sets

get.description: Returns historical SGP4 element sets. Contains 138+ million element sets spanning the full history of space tracking. Rate limit: 1 query per lifetime — download once and store locally.
Returns catalog metadata for tracked Earth-orbiting objects including payloads, rocket bodies, and debris. Rate limit: 1 query per day after 17:00 UTC.
Returns records of changes to the satellite catalog. Useful for tracking updates to object names, status, and classifications.
Returns recently cataloged objects — new entrants to the satellite catalog. Rate limit: 1 query per day after 17:00 UTC.
Returns satellite reentry/decay predictions and historical decay data. Rate limit: 1 query per day. Download once and store locally; query with MSG_EPOCH>now-1 for updates.
Returns conjunction data messages for close approaches between tracked objects. Rate limit: 3 queries per day for all conjunctions; 1 per hour for specific events.

get.summary: Query Tracking and Impact Prediction (TIP) messages
get.description: Returns reentry tracking and impact prediction messages for hazardous debris. Rate limit: 1 per hour normally; 1 per 10 minutes when reentry is within 12 hours.

get.summary: Query orbital object boxscore by country
get.description: Returns a country-level accounting of cataloged objects in orbit. Rate limit: 1 query per day after 17:00 UTC.
Returns reference data for all recognized launch sites and their codes used in the satellite catalog.
Returns system and operational announcements from Space-Track.
DEPRECATED — use /class/gp/ instead. Returns Orbit Mean-Elements Message (OMM) data in XML format.

200.description: OMM records (deprecated class, use gp instead)

get.description: DEPRECATED — use /class/gp/ instead. Returns legacy TLE format element sets.
DEPRECATED — use /class/gp/ instead. Returns the most recent TLE for each tracked object.

200.description: Latest TLE records (deprecated, use gp instead)

get.description: DEPRECATED — use /class/gp/ instead. Returns TLE publication timestamps.
Returns full conjunction data messages from the expanded space data controller. Requires elevated access. Contains complete CCSDS-compliant CDM data including covariance matrices.
Returns maneuver records for satellites that have performed propulsive maneuvers. Requires expanded space data access.
Returns historical maneuver records for satellites.
Returns organization reference data for satellite operators and countries.
Returns expanded satellite data with additional fields beyond the basic SATCAT.
Returns conjunction assessment result records from the expanded space data controller.

sessionCookie.name: chocolatechip
sessionCookie.description: Session cookie obtained by POSTing credentials to /ajaxauth/login

queryParams.name: queryParams
queryParams.description: Flexible REST query path segments. Format: /FIELD/VALUE/FIELD2/VALUE2/format/FORMAT/. Supports operators: range (--), greater-than (%3E), less-than (%3C), null (null-val), comma lists. Example: /NORAD_CAT_ID/25544/format/json/

Unauthorized.description: Authentication required. Login at /ajaxauth/login first to obtain a session cookie.

RateLimited.description: Rate limit exceeded. Maximum 30 requests per minute or 300 per hour globally. Per-class rate limits also apply.

GPRecord.description: General Perturbations (GP) orbital element set in OMM format

CREATION_DATE.description: Element set creation date/time in UTC

EPOCH.description: Epoch of the element set in UTC

MEAN_MOTION.description: Mean motion in revolutions per day

RA_OF_ASC_NODE.description: Right ascension of ascending node in degrees

DECAY_DATE.description: Date of decay/reentry (null if still in orbit)

TLE_LINE0.description: TLE line 0 (object name, only in TLE/3LE format)

COUNTRY.description: Country of origin or registration code

DECAY.description: Decay/reentry date (null if still in orbit)

OBJECT_NUMBER.description: NORAD catalog number as integer string

SATCATChangeRecord.description: Record of a change to the satellite catalog

FIELD_CHANGED.description: Name of the field that was changed

CDMRecord.description: Conjunction Data Message (CDM) record following CCSDS standard

EMERGENCY_REPORTABLE.description: Whether the conjunction is emergency reportable (Y/N)

TCA.description: Time of closest approach in UTC

MIN_RNG.description: Minimum range at TCA in meters

SAT1_ID.description: NORAD catalog ID of first object

SAT2_ID.description: NORAD catalog ID of second object

TIPRecord.description: Tracking and Impact Prediction (TIP) message record

ORBITAL_TBA.description: Objects with TBA status still in orbit

ORBITAL_ROCKET_BODY_COUNT.description: Number of rocket bodies in orbit

ORBITAL_DEBRIS_COUNT.description: Number of debris objects in orbit

ORBITAL_TOTAL_COUNT.description: Total number of objects in orbit

COUNTRY_TOTAL.description: Total objects attributed to this country

SITE_CODE.description: Short code for the launch site

LAUNCH_SITE.description: Full name of the launch site
LAUNCH_SITE.example: Tyuratam Missile and Space Center, Baikonur, Kazakhstan

MANEUVER_EPOCH.description: Epoch of the maneuver in UTC
